Demo Name: AI-driven Anomaly Detection & Predictive Analytics
Goal of Demo: Predict major incidents before they occur (Zero MI)
Inputs Required: CrowdStrike EDR telemetry; observability data (MELT, logs, traces); firewall logs; access logs; historical incidents; change data; threat intel; regulations (GDPR, SOX), ISO_42001
Output: Predictive alert with probability and root cause hypothesis
Possible AI Analysis: Multivariate pattern recognition; unsupervised ML (clustering, isolation forest)
Relevant Vendor Tools: Netdata MCP, Splunk MCP, CrowdStrike Falcon MCP, Dynatrace MCP Gateway
Agents Involved: Monitoring Agent, Anomaly Detection Agent, Predictive Analytics Agent, Health Agent
